title: Create: Coins
description: Addon for the Create mod. It adds coins.
body:
This addon for the Create mod adds 6 types of coins: copper, iron, zinc, gold, brass, diamond.

---

All of them are made by flattening and sawing. But zinc and diamond coins are made differently; zinc do not need to be sawed and diamond do not need to be flattened.

---
